title: What is this game
wikitext:
[]: What is this game?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Fri Apr 02, 2021 12:59 am You know what this game is with Evangelion, because you don't understand Japanese. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D_K5yUNMF5s

[]: Re: What is this game?             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Apr 02, 2021 10:35 am Judging by the fact that it's a camera pointed at a screen as well as the stuff around is, I'm gonna say it's some pachinko machine in an arcade hall somewhere

[]: Re: What is this game?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Fri Apr 02, 2021 10:42 am Possible ... thanks for your help.

[]: Re: What is this game?             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Apr 02, 2021 10:46 am Someone in Japan ?might? be able to track it down, but I wouldn't hold my breath for it; arcade machines are known to nonchalantly vanish sometimes, so there's a decent chance this one isn't even around anymore considering that the video is almost 10 years old

[]: Re: What is this game?             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Sat Apr 03, 2021 9:53 am Yeah, it was one of those pachislot games. More specifically, it was a mobaslo, which means that players could get extra members-only services if they signed up on the game's mobile phone site. This particular game was called Evangelion ~Shinjitsu no Tsubasa~ (Evangelion ~Wings of Truth~). I hope that helps!
